message.content:
{
  "concepts": [
    {"text": "Crimea", "rationale": "region at the center of the article"},
    {"text": "annexation", "rationale": "the event being described"},
    {"text": "Russian Federation", "rationale": "state that annexed Crimea"},
    {"text": "2014", "rationale": "year of the annexation"},
    {"text": "self-determination", "rationale": "democratic principle invoked in the argument"},
    {"text": "Ukrainian Revolution", "rationale": "political upheaval preceding the annexation"},
    {"text": "Euromaidan", "rationale": "name given to the Ukrainian revolution"},
    {"text": "Viktor Yanukovych", "rationale": "ousted Ukrainian president mentioned"},
    {"text": "Kyiv", "rationale": "Ukrainian capital referenced"},
    {"text": "Ukraine", "rationale": "country whose sovereignty is discussed"},
    {"text": "European Union", "rationale": "international organization referenced as influence on Kyiv"},
    {"text": "NATO", "rationale": "international organization referenced as influence on Kyiv"},
    {"text": "referendums", "rationale": "voting events cited as expressing local will"},
    {"text": "Organization for Security and Co-operation in Europe", "rationale": "international body named as observers"},
    {"text": "OSCE", "rationale": "acronym for the observer organization"},
    {"text": "international monitors", "rationale": "observers reported to have overseen voting"},
    {"text": "Peaceful Transition", "rationale": "section heading describing the nature of the process"},
    {"text": "Russian forces", "rationale": "military actors present on the ground"},
    {"text": "Russian military intervention", "rationale": "military action noted in the account"},
    {"text": "Ukrainian troops", "rationale": "Ukrainian military presence referenced"},
    {"text": "United Nations Security Council", "rationale": "UN body said to have condemned the annexation"},
    {"text": "international law", "rationale": "legal framework discussed in the response"},
    {"text": "UN Charter", "rationale": "document cited for the principle of self-determination"},
    {"text": "international community", "rationale": "global actors described as divided in response"},
    {"text": "ethnic Russian population", "rationale": "demographic group in Crimea invoked as supporting reunification"},
    {"text": "Crimean people", "rationale": "local population whose will is central to the argument"},
    {"text": "Crimean population", "rationale": "alternative phrase for local inhabitants cited in the text"},
    {"text": "peaceful and orderly manner", "rationale": "description of how the voting was reported to have been conducted"}
  ]
}
